title: PlanetSubscriptionDataFilterBase
description: Selection criteria for the data the subscription should cover. At the minimum, `timeRange.from` must be included because subscriptions must have a start time.

allOf.description: A time interval to filter data by the **publish** date (in contrast to orders, where the data is filtered by the acquisition date). It is defined by a start and end date and time, e.g. 2019-01-31T14:00:00+01:00. A date representation without time (e.g. 2019-01-31) will not work. Both the start and end of a time interval are inclusive and can be equal.
